recommendations.title: The Blackcoat's Daughter
recommendations.overview: Two young women at a prestigious prep school are assailed by an evil, invisible power when they're stranded over winter break.

recommendations.title: I Am the Pretty Thing That Lives in the House
recommendations.overview: A young nurse takes care of an elderly author who lives in a haunted house.

recommendations.title: Ghosts
recommendations.overview: In the town of Normal Valley, an eccentric magician named Maestro entertains the local children every day in his spooky mansion. One stormy night, the town's mayor leads a group of angry citizens to the mansion in an attempt to run Maestro out of tow

recommendations.title: Gretel & Hansel
recommendations.overview: A long time ago in a distant fairy tale countryside, a young girl leads her little brother into a dark wood in desperate search of food and work, only to stumble upon a nexus of terrifying evil.

recommendations.title: Guava Island
recommendations.overview: Deni Maroon, a musician and dock worker is determined to pull off a music festival against the interests of the local factory owner.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: Pretty Lethal
recommendations.overview: A troupe of ballerinas find themselves fighting for survival as they attempt to escape from a remote inn after their bus breaks down on the way to a dance competition.

recommendations.title: Keeper
recommendations.overview: Liz and Malcolm escape for a romantic anniversary weekend at a secluded cabin. When Malcolm suddenly returns to the city, Liz finds herself isolated and in the presence of an unspeakable evil that reveals the cabin's horrifying secrets.

recommendations.title: The Music Man
recommendations.overview: Traveling con artist Harold Hill targets the naïve residents of a small town in 1910s Iowa by posing as a boys' bandleader to raise money before he can skip town.

recommendations.title: Longlegs
